title: "Vic gave you insulin when he shouldn't have, so now we need to stabilize your glucose level."

events.text: In the moment, we want to focus on stabilizing the client.[br4.07][br4.151]After the situation is resolved, we can go into more detail about the drop in blood glucose,[br9.299][br9.38]but even then, we don't want to assign blame to Vic or anyone else on the health care team.[br15.204]
